response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed income domains, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 in LabWindows, it is outdated and not tied to financial systems, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated proficiency in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active contributor to open-source and educational initiatives
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience on Windows for financial systems
Lacks demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or fixed income domain expertise
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with role requirements
